'''âw-n-zh''' ('''kawanazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quartermaster|quartermaster]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quartermaster|quartermaster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kawanazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwanazh|thiwanazh]] || [[word:jiwanazh|jiwanazh]] || [[word:shiwanazh|shiwanazh]] || [[word:kiwanazh|kiwanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwanazh|thuthuwanazh]] || [[word:jujuwanazh|jujuwanazh]] || [[word:shushuwanazh|shushuwanazh]] || [[word:kukuwanazh|kukuwanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwanazh|thuwanazh]] || [[word:juwanazh|juwanazh]] || [[word:shuwanazh|shuwanazh]] || [[word:kuwanazh|kuwanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwanazh|thuwanazh]] || [[word:juwanazh|juwanazh]] || [[word:shuwanazh|shuwanazh]] || [[word:kuwanazh|kuwanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewanazh|thewanazh]] || [[word:jewanazh|jewanazh]] || [[word:shewanazh|shewanazh]] || [[word:kewanazh|kewanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowanazh|thothowanazh]] || [[word:jojowanazh|jojowanazh]] || [[word:shoshowanazh|shoshowanazh]] || [[word:kokowanazh|kokowanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowanazh|thowanazh]] || [[word:jowanazh|jowanazh]] || [[word:showanazh|showanazh]] || [[word:kowanazh|kowanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowanazh|thowanazh]] || [[word:jowanazh|jowanazh]] || [[word:showanazh|showanazh]] || [[word:kowanazh|kowanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwanazh|thĂŠwanazh]] || [[word:jĂŠwanazh|jĂŠwanazh]] || [[word:shĂŠwanazh|shĂŠwanazh]] || [[word:kĂŠwanazh|kĂŠwanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawanazh|thathawanazh]] || [[word:jajawanazh|jajawanazh]] || [[word:shashawanazh|shashawanazh]] || [[word:kakawanazh|kakawanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawanazh|thawanazh]] || [[word:jawanazh|jawanazh]] || [[word:shawanazh|shawanazh]] || [[word:kawanazh|kawanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawanazh|thawanazh]] || [[word:jawanazh|jawanazh]] || [[word:shawanazh|shawanazh]] || [[word:kawanazh|kawanazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawanazh|shawanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawanazh|goshawanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawanazh|gokishawanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawanazhnĂŒ|shawanazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawanazhnknĂŒ|goshawanazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanazhnĂŒ|gokishawanazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawanazhshĂ«|shawanazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkshĂ«|goshawanazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawanazhshĂ«|gokishawanazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanazhro|shawanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkro|goshawanazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanazhro|gokishawanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanazhmu|shawanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkmu|goshawanazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanazhmu|gokishawanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawanazhsher|shawanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawanazhnksher|goshawanazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawanazhsher|gokishawanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawanazhng|shawanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkng|goshawanazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawanazhng|gokishawanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawanazhya|shawanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkya|goshawanazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawanazhya|gokishawanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawanazhyam|shawanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkyam|goshawanazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawanazhyam|gokishawanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanazhnĂŒshĂ«|shawanazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawanazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawanazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanazhnĂŒro|shawanazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanazhnknĂŒro|goshawanazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanazhnĂŒro|gokishawanazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanazhnĂŒmu|shawanazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanazhnknĂŒmu|goshawanazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanazhnĂŒmu|gokishawanazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shawanazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawanazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawanazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanazhshĂ«ro|shawanazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkshĂ«ro|goshawanazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanazhshĂ«ro|gokishawanazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanazhshĂ«mu|shawanazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkshĂ«mu|goshawanazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanazhshĂ«mu|gokishawanazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanazhronĂŒ|shawanazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkronĂŒ|goshawanazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanazhronĂŒ|gokishawanazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanazhroshĂ«|shawanazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkroshĂ«|goshawanazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanazhroshĂ«|gokishawanazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanazhromu|shawanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkromu|goshawanazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanazhromu|gokishawanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanazhmunĂŒ|shawanazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkmunĂŒ|goshawanazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanazhmunĂŒ|gokishawanazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanazhmushĂ«|shawanazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkmushĂ«|goshawanazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanazhmushĂ«|gokishawanazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanazhmuro|shawanazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanazhnkmuro|goshawanazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanazhmuro|gokishawanazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
